title: The All-India Institute of Medical Science Act, 1956
full_text: The All-India Institute of Medical Science Act, 1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195625 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 1956-06-02 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The All-India Institute of Medical Science Act, 1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of All-India Institutes of Medical Sciences. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 15-11-1956 Notification: 15th November, 1956, vide notification No. S. R. O. 2688, dated 6th November, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, s. 3. TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The All-India Institute of Medical Science Act, 1956 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment and incorporation of the Institute. Section 4. Composition of the Institute. Section 5. Declaration of Institutes as institution of national importance. Section 6. Term of office of, and vacancies among, members. Section 7. President of the Institute. Section 8. Allowances of President and members. Section 9. Meetings of the Institute. Section 10. Governing Body and other Committees of the Institute. Section 11. Staff of the Institute. Section 12. Location of the Institute. Section 13. Objects of the Institute. Section 14. Functions of the Institute. Section 15. Payment to the Institute. Section 16. Fund of the Institute. Section 17. Budget of the Institute. Section 18. Accounts and audit. Section 19. Annual Report. Section 20. Pension and provident funds. Section 21. Authentication of the orders and instruments of the Institute. Section 22. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 23. Recognition of Medical, dental and nursing qualifications granted by the Institute. Section 24. Grant of medical, dental or nursing degrees, diplomas, etc., by the Institute. Section 25. Control by Central Government. Section 26. Disputes between the Institute and the Central Government. Section 27. Returns and information. Section 27A. Incorporation of Institute registered as society under the Societies Registration Act, 1860. Section 27B. Effect of incorporation of Institutes. Section 27C. Provisions of this Act to apply to societies incorporated into All-India Institutes of Medical Science under section 27A. Section 27D. Power to make transitory provisions for Institutes (other than existing Institute). Section 28. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Power to make regulations.
